'''bachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:salpingoscopically|salpingoscopically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:salpingoscopically|salpingoscopically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bachate|bachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bachatesher|bachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bachatesherĂ«m|bachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bachatero|bachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bachateshĂ«|bachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bachateshĂ«m|bachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibachatero|gokibachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibachateshĂ«|gokibachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibachateshĂ«m|gokibachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobachankerom|gobachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobachankeshĂ«|gobachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobachankeshĂ«m|gobachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobachankeya|gobachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bachaterom|bachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bachatemu|bachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bachateya|bachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibachaterom|gokibachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibachatemu|gokibachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibachateya|gokibachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bachachate|bachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bachachatesher|bachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bachachatesherĂ«m|bachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bachachatero|bachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bachachateshĂ«|bachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bachachateshĂ«m|bachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibachachatero|gokibachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibachachateshĂ«|gokibachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibachachateshĂ«m|gokibachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobachachankerom|gobachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobachachankeshĂ«|gobachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobachachankeshĂ«m|gobachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobachachankeya|gobachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bachachaterom|bachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bachachatemu|bachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bachachateya|bachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibachachaterom|gokibachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibachachatemu|gokibachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibachachateya|gokibachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠchĂŠte|bĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠchĂŠtesher|bĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠchĂŠtero|bĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠchĂŠtero|gokibĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠchĂŠterom|bĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠchĂŠtemu|bĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠchĂŠteya|bĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠchĂŠterom|gokibĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠchĂŠteya|gokibĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafchafte|bafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafchaftesher|bafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafchaftesherĂ«m|bafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafchaftero|bafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafchafteshĂ«|bafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafchafteshĂ«m|bafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafchaftero|gokibafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafchafteshĂ«|gokibafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafchafteshĂ«m|gokibafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafchafnkerom|gobafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafchafnkeshĂ«|gobafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafchafnkeshĂ«m|gobafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafchafnkeya|gobafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafchafterom|bafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafchaftemu|bafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafchafteya|bafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafchafterom|gokibafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafchaftemu|gokibafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafchafteya|gokibafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
